title: Example 1
question: Please click on the location of the scissors.
instruction: Select a frame, click the target location, then save your answer.
ground_truth_text: The scissors is to the side of and above the dish drying rack, about 4 cm away. It is also to the side of and below the neon light, about 9 cm away. It is further to the side of and below the kitchen cabinet, about 12 cm away.
